title: VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON PUBLIC BROADCASTING VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for individuals to donate automobiles and recreational vehicles (RVs).The program is handled by Speed's Towing. All proceeds from vehicle sales go back to agency and individuals will receive a tax credit. All vehicles must have engines, be towable, and not have any liens on title. 7140 S Macadam Avenue Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 421-3273 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 421-3273 Speed's Towing Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, email, or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Clear vehicle title with owner name LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Vehicle Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON PUBLIC BROADCASTING
